name: Babute
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef, salt, and curry powder in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and half and half.
3. Stir in half of the egg mixture with the beef; add the chopped dried apricots.
4. Pour the remaining egg mixture over the top of the beef mixture in a greased 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
5. Float several bay leaves on top of the milk.
6. Dot the dish with butter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes, or until the top resembles baked custard.
